zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Juliana Boteler於1415年出生在英國史洛普爾阿爾維勒時，她的父親Ralph le Boteler22歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Norbury22歲。她於1433年與Thomas de Moreton在英國英格蘭貝德福爾比格萊斯瓦德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1471年在英國斯塔福爾莫雷頓享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Juliana Boteler于1415年出生在英国史洛普爾阿爾維勒时，她的父亲Ralph le Boteler22岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Norbury22岁。她于1433年与Thomas de Moreton在英国英格兰貝德福爾比格萊斯瓦德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1471年在英国斯塔福爾莫雷頓享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Boteler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker of leather bottles, from an agent derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bouteille ‘bottle’.

nameMeanings.name: Juliana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Julianus ( see Julian ), which was revived in England in the 18th century and has been used occasionally ever since.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Juliana Boteler was born in 1415, in Alveley, Shropshire, England, her father, Ralph le Boteler, was 22 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Norbury, was 22. She married Thomas de Moreton in 1433, in Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1471, in Moreton, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Juliana Boteler est née en 1415, à Alveley, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph le Boteler, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Norbury, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas de Moreton en 1433, à Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1471, à Moreton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Juliana Boteler 1415 in Alveley, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph le Boteler 22 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth Norbury 22. Sie hat 1433 in Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom Thomas de Moreton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1471 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Moreton, Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Juliana Boteler è nata il nel 1415 nel Alveley, Shropshire, England, sua padre, Ralph le Boteler, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth Norbury, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Thomas de Moreton nel 1433, nel Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1471, nel Moreton, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Juliana Botelerが1415年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアアルベリーで生まれた時，父Ralph le Botelerは22歳，母Lady Elizabeth Norburyは22歳であった。1433年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアビググレスワドでThomas de Moretonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1471年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアモーエトンで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Juliana Boteler(이)가 1415년 영국 슈럽실르 앨벨리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph le Boteler(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Norbury(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1433년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 비글레스웨이드에서 Thomas de Moreton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1471년 영국 스태퍼드실르 모레턴에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, England, Unit: Biggleswade, Beadafordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Juliana Boteler nasceu em 1415, em Alveley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph le Boteler, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Norbury, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas de Moreton em 1433, em Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1471, em Moreton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Juliana Boteler родилась в 1415 г. в местности алвели, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Ralph le Boteler было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Norbury, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Moreton в 1433 г. в местности биглесвад, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1471 г. в местности моретон, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Juliana Boteler nació en 1415, en Alveley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph le Boteler, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Norbury, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Thomas de Moreton en 1433, en Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1471, en Moreton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años.
